name: Vermont Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: 6 large tart apples, pared, and cored
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread half of the apples in the pastry shell.
2. Combine the remaining 6 ingredients (ginger snap cookie crumbs, flour, cinnamon, salt, butter, and walnuts) in a bowl.
3. Spread one-third of this mixture over the apples.
4. Spread the remaining apples with the mixture.
5. Sprinkle the remaining crumbs and walnuts on top.
6. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for about 50 minutes, covering with foil during the last 25 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven.
8. Pour syrup evenly over the pie.
